mte_summary: Validate BPMS015 Subcontracted Requisition Rejection Logic

test_cases.scenario: Verify standard non-subcontracted requisition flows through BPMS015 approval workflow without errors.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a standard requisition (non-subcontracted) with valid data.
steps.expectedResult: Standard PRQ created successfully without subcontracted item flags.

steps.action: Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted and moved to approval queue in Bizagi.

steps.action: Approve the requisition in the BPMS015 workflow.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition approved without validation errors.

steps.action: Verify Purchase Order generation in ERP.
steps.expectedResult: Purchase Order generated successfully without subcontracted item issues.

test_cases.scenario: Verify valid subcontracted requisition with all required data (Peg, BP, Default Items linked) is approved correctly in BPMS015.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a requisition marked as Subcontracted with valid Peg/GI info.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition created with Subcontracted flag and valid Peg/GI data populated.

steps.action: Ensure Buyer Product (BP) and Employee supplier info are valid.
steps.expectedResult: Buyer Product and Supplier Employee information validated and saved.

steps.action: Submit the subcontracted requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted and moved to approval queue in Bizagi.

steps.action: Approve the requisition in the BPMS015 workflow.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition approved without validation errors.

test_cases.scenario: Verify subcontracted requisition with missing Peg/GI information is rejected and email notification is sent.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a subcontracted requisition and leave Peg/GI fields blank.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition created in draft with missing Peg/GI data.

steps.action: Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted for validation.

steps.action: Check BPMS015 approval screen for error message.
steps.expectedResult: System rejects the request with message: 'Peg/GI information required for subcontracted requisitions'.

steps.action: Verify email notification is sent to the requester.
steps.expectedResult: Email received with rejection details and specific validation error.

test_cases.scenario: Verify subcontracted requisition with blank Buyer Product (BP) or Employee supplier information is rejected and email notification is sent.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a subcontracted requisition and leave Buyer Product/Supplier Employee fields blank.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition created in draft with blank BP/Supplier info.

steps.action: Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted for validation.

steps.action: Check BPMS015 approval screen for error message.
steps.expectedResult: System rejects the request with message: 'Buyer Product/Supplier info mandatory'.

steps.action: Verify email notification is sent to the requester.
steps.expectedResult: Email received with rejection details and specific validation error.

test_cases.scenario: Verify subcontracted requisition with SubConDefault items not linked to production orders is rejected and email notification is sent.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a subcontracted requisition using SubConDefault items without production order linkage.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition created with default items but without active production order link.

steps.action: Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted for validation.

steps.action: Check BPMS015 approval screen for error message.
steps.expectedResult: System rejects the request with message: 'SubConDefault items must be linked to active production orders'.

steps.action: Verify email notification is sent to the requester.
steps.expectedResult: Email received with rejection details and specific validation error.

test_cases.scenario: Verify multi-line requisition containing subcontracted items is rejected and email notification is sent.

steps.action: Login to ERP system and navigate to Purchase Requisition creation.
steps.expectedResult: User successfully logged in and navigated to PRQ creation screen.

steps.action: Create a multi-line requisition with at least one line marked as Subcontracted.
steps.expectedResult: Multi-line PRQ created with mixed standard and subcontracted items.

steps.action: Ensure Subcontracted lines are missing required validation data (Peg/GI/BP).
steps.expectedResult: Requisition saved with valid lines and invalid subcontracted lines.

steps.action: Submit the multi-line requisition for approval via BPMS015.
steps.expectedResult: Requisition submitted for validation.

steps.action: Check BPMS015 approval screen for error message.
steps.expectedResult: System rejects the entire request with message regarding validation failure in line X.
